title: chlidanthus fragrans
intro: Chlidanthus fragrans, also known as the winter's corydalis or sweet wintergreen, is a plant species in the family Berberidaceae. Chlidanthus fragrans is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The plant has several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs and congestion, and acting as a natural remedy for respiratory issues. Chlidanthus fragrans is typically prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and it can also be used in tincture form to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
